creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144761
Patch to sed(1) to fix PR 160745

The patch fixes a problem where sed(1) adds a newline to the last line, even if the original last line didn't have one. This now matches GNU sed's behavior.

The patch is in Phabricator too: https://phabric.freebsd.org/D431
